name: Agliata Per Pasta (Garlic & Walnut Sauce For
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bread in the stock and then squeeze out any excess moisture.
2. Combine the bread with the walnuts, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper in a food processor.
3. Process, adding the olive oil in a very slow stream until you have a thick paste.
4. Toss with your favorite pasta and serve hot.
